verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt reges, quos percusserunt filii Israël, et possederunt terram eorum trans Jordanem ad solis ortum, a torrente Arnon usque ad montem Hermon, et omnem orientalem plagam, quæ respicit solitudinem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣לֶּה ׀ מַלְכֵ֣י הָאָ֗רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִכּ֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ וַיִּֽרְשׁ֣וּ אֶת־אַרְצָ֔ם בְּעֵ֥בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן מִזְרְחָ֣ה הַשָּׁ֑מֶשׁ מִנַּ֤חַל אַרְנוֹן֙ עַד־הַ֣ר חֶרְמ֔וֹן וְכׇל־הָעֲרָבָ֖ה מִזְרָֽחָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the kings, whom the children of Israel slew and possessed their land beyond the Jordan towards the rising of the sun, from the torrent Arnon unto mount Hermon, and all the east country that looketh towards the wilderness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät ovat maan kuninkaat, jotka Israelin lapset löivät, ja ottivat heidän maansa tuolla puolella Jordania, auringon nousemista päin, Arnonin ojasta Hermonin vuoreen asti, ja kaikki lakeudet itään päin:
verses.king_james: Now these are the kings of the land, which the children of Israel smote, and possessed their land on the other side Jordan toward the rising of the sun, from the river Arnon unto mount Hermon, and all the plain on the east:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sehon rex Amorrhæorum, qui habitavit in Hesebon, dominatus est ab Aroër, quæ sita est super ripam torrentis Arnon, et mediæ partis in valle, dimidiæque Galaad, usque ad torrentem Jaboc, qui est terminus filiorum Ammon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סִיחוֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֔י הַיּוֹשֵׁ֖ב בְּחֶשְׁבּ֑וֹן מֹשֵׁ֡ל מֵעֲרוֹעֵ֡ר אֲשֶׁר֩ עַל־שְׂפַת־נַ֨חַל אַרְנ֜וֹן וְת֤וֹךְ הַנַּ֙חַל֙ וַחֲצִ֣י הַגִּלְעָ֔ד וְעַד֙ יַבֹּ֣ק הַנַּ֔חַל גְּב֖וּל בְּנֵ֥י עַמּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sehon king of the Amorrhites, who dwelt in Hesebon, and had dominion from Aroer, which is seated upon the bank of the torrent Arnon, and of the middle part in the valley, and of half Galaad, as far as the torrent Jaboc, which is the border of the children of Ammon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sihon Amorilaisten kuningas, joka asui Hesbonissa ja hallitsi Aroerista, joka on Arnonin ojan reunalla, ja keskellä ojaa, ja puolen Gileadia Jabbokin ojaan asti, joka on Ammonin lasten raja,
verses.king_james: Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt in Heshbon, and ruled from Aroer, which is upon the bank of the river Arnon, and from the middle of the river, and from half Gilead, even unto the river Jabbok, which is the border of the children of Ammon;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et a solitudine usque ad mare Ceneroth contra orientem, et usque ad mare deserti, quod est mare salsissimum, ad orientalem plagam per viam quæ ducit Bethsimoth : et ab australi parte, quæ subjacet Asedoth, Phasga.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָעֲרָבָה֩ עַד־יָ֨ם כִּנְר֜וֹת מִזְרָ֗חָה וְ֠עַ֠ד יָ֣ם הָעֲרָבָ֤ה יָם־הַמֶּ֙לַח֙ מִזְרָ֔חָה דֶּ֖רֶךְ בֵּ֣ית הַיְשִׁמ֑וֹת וּמִ֨תֵּימָ֔ן תַּ֖חַת אַשְׁדּ֥וֹת הַפִּסְגָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And from the wilderness, to the sea of Ceneroth towards the east, and to the sea of the wilderness, which is the most salt sea, on the east side by the way that leadeth to Bethsimoth: and on the south side that lieth under Asedoth, Phasga.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja lakeutta Kinneretin mereen asti itään päin, ja korven mereen, Suolaiseen mereen itään päin, BetJesimotin tietä myöten, ja lounaasta alaspäin lähelle Asdot Pisgaa;
verses.king_james: And from the plain to the sea of Chinneroth on the east, and unto the sea of the plain, even the salt sea on the east, the way to Beth–jeshimoth; and from the south, under Ashdoth–pisgah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Terminus Og regis Basan, de reliquiis Raphaim, qui habitavit in Astaroth, et in Edrai, et dominatus est in monte Hermon, et in Salecha, atque in universa Basan, usque ad terminos
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּגְב֗וּל ע֚וֹג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֔ן מִיֶּ֖תֶר הָרְפָאִ֑ים הַיּוֹשֵׁ֥ב בְּעַשְׁתָּר֖וֹת וּבְאֶדְרֶֽעִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The border of Og the king of Basan, of the remnant of the Raphaims who dwelt in Astaroth, and in Edrai, and had dominion in mount Hermon, and in Salecha, and in all Basan, unto the borders
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen myös Ogin Basanin kuninkaan maan rajat, joka vielä jäänyt oli uljaista, ja asui Astarotissa ja Edreissä,
verses.king_james: And the coast of Og king of Bashan, which was of the remnant of the giants, that dwelt at Ashtaroth and at Edrei,

verses.latin_vulgate: Gessuri, et Machati, et dimidiæ partis Galaad : terminos Sehon regis Hesebon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֠מֹשֵׁ֠ל בְּהַ֨ר חֶרְמ֤וֹן וּבְסַלְכָה֙ וּבְכׇל־הַבָּשָׁ֔ן עַד־גְּב֥וּל הַגְּשׁוּרִ֖י וְהַמַּעֲכָתִ֑י וַֽחֲצִי֙ הַגִּלְעָ֔ד גְּב֖וּל סִיח֥וֹן מֶֽלֶךְ־חֶשְׁבּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of Gessuri and Machati, and of half Galaad: the borders of Sehon the king of Hesebon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hallitsi Hermonin vuorella, Salkassa ja koko Basanissa, Gessurin ja Maakatin maan rajoihin, ja puolen Gileadia, joka Sihonin Hesbonin kuninkaan maan raja oli.
verses.king_james: And reigned in mount Hermon, and in Salcah, and in all Bashan, unto the border of the Geshurites and the Maachathites, and half Gilead, the border of Sihon king of Heshbon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moyses famulus Domini et filii Israël percusserunt eos, tradiditque terram eorum Moyses in possessionem Rubenitis, et Gaditis, et dimidiæ tribui Manasse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹשֶׁ֧ה עֶבֶד־יְהֹוָ֛ה וּבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל הִכּ֑וּם וַֽ֠יִּתְּנָ֠הּ מֹשֶׁ֨ה עֶבֶד־יְהֹוָ֜ה יְרֻשָּׁ֗ה לָרֽאוּבֵנִי֙ וְלַגָּדִ֔י וְלַחֲצִ֖י שֵׁ֥בֶט הַֽמְנַשֶּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moses the servant of the Lord, and the children of Israel slew them, and Moses delivered their land in possession to the Rubenites, and Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Moses Herran palvelia ja Israelin lapset löivät heitä; ja Moses Herran palvelia antoi sen Rubenilaisille, Gadilaisille ja puolelle Manassen sukukunnalle omaisuudeksi.
verses.king_james: Them did Moses the servant of the Lord and the children of Israel smite: and Moses the servant of the Lord gave it for a possession unto the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt reges terræ, quos percussit Josue et filii Israël trans Jordanem ad occidentalem plagam, a Baalgad in campo Libani, usque ad montem cujus pars ascendit in Seir : tradiditque eam Josue in possessionem tribubus Israël, singulis partes suas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣לֶּה מַלְכֵ֣י הָאָ֡רֶץ אֲשֶׁר֩ הִכָּ֨ה יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ וּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל בְּעֵ֤בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ יָ֔מָּה מִבַּ֤עַל גָּד֙ בְּבִקְעַ֣ת הַלְּבָנ֔וֹן וְעַד־הָהָ֥ר הֶחָלָ֖ק הָעֹלֶ֣ה שֵׂעִ֑ירָה וַיִּתְּנָ֨הּ יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ לְשִׁבְטֵ֧י יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל יְרֻשָּׁ֖ה כְּמַחְלְקֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the kings of the land, whom Joshua and the children of Israel slew beyond the Jordan on the west side from Baalgad in the field of Libanus, unto the mount, part of which goeth up into Seir: and Joshua delivered it in possession to the tribes of Israel, to every one their divisions,
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat maan kuninkaat, jotka Josua löi ja Israelin lapset tällä puolella Jordania länteen päin, BaalGadista Libanonin vuorenlakeudella, sileään vuoreen, joka ulottuu Seiriin, jonka Josua Israelin sukukunnille antoi omaisuudeksi itsekullekin osansa jälkeen,
verses.king_james: And these are the kings of the country which Joshua and the children of Israel smote on this side Jordan on the west, from Baal–gad in the valley of Lebanon even unto the mount Halak, that goeth up to Seir; which Joshua gave unto the tribes of Israel for a possession according to their divisions;

verses.latin_vulgate: tam in montanis quam in planis atque campestribus. In Asedoth, et in solitudine, ac in meridie, Hethæus fuit et Amorrhæus, Chananæus, et Pherezæus, Hevæus et Jebusæus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּהָ֣ר וּבַשְּׁפֵלָ֗ה וּבָֽעֲרָבָה֙ וּבָ֣אֲשֵׁד֔וֹת וּבַמִּדְבָּ֖ר וּבַנֶּ֑גֶב הַֽחִתִּי֙ הָאֱמֹרִ֔י וְהַֽכְּנַעֲנִי֙ הַפְּרִזִּ֔י הַחִוִּ֖י וְהַיְבוּסִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: As well in the mountains as in the plains and the champaign countries. In Asedoth, and in the wilderness, and in the south was the Hethite and the Amorrhite, the Chanaanite and the Pherezite, the Hevite and the Jebusite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vuorilla, laaksoissa, lakeudella, vetten tykönä, korvessa, ja lounaan puolessa: Hetiläiset, Amorilaiset, Kanaanealaiset, Pheresiläiset, Heviläiset ja Jebusilaiset;
verses.king_james: In the mountains, and in the valleys, and in the plains, and in the springs, and in the wilderness, and in the south country; the Hittites, the Amorites, and the Canaanites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites:

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex Jericho unus : rex Hai, quæ est ex latere Bethel, unus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֥לֶךְ יְרִיח֖וֹ אֶחָ֑ד מֶ֧לֶךְ הָעַ֛י אֲשֶׁר־מִצַּ֥ד בֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Jericho one: the king of Hai, which is on the side of Bethel, one:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jerihon kuningas, yksi; Ain kuningas, joka BetElin sivussa on, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Jericho, one; the king of Ai, which is beside Beth–el, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Jerusalem unus, rex Hebron unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ יְרֽוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ חֶבְר֖וֹן אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Jerusalem one, the king of Hebron one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jerusalemin kuningas, yksi; Hebronin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Jerusalem, one; the king of Hebron, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Jerimoth unus, rex Lachis unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ יַרְמוּת֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ לָכִ֖ישׁ אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Jerimoth one, thee king of Lachis one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jarmutin kuningas, yksi; Lakiksen kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Jarmuth, one; the king of Lachish, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Eglon unus, rex Gazer unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ עֶגְלוֹן֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ גֶּ֖זֶר אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Eglon one, the king of Gazer one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Eglonin kuningas, yksi; Geserin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Eglon, one; the king of Gezer, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Dabir unus, rex Gader unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ דְּבִר֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ גֶּ֖דֶר אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Dabir one, the king of Gader one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Debirin kuningas, yksi; Gederin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Debir, one; the king of Geder, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Herma unus, rex Hered unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ חׇרְמָה֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ עֲרָ֖ד אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Herma one, the king of Hered one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Horman kuningas, yksi; Aradin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Hormah, one; the king of Arad, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Lebna unus, rex Odullam unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ לִבְנָה֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ עֲדֻלָּ֖ם אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Lebna one, the king of Odullam one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Libnan kuningas, yksi; Adullamin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Libnah, one; the king of Adullam, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Maceda unus, rex Bethel unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ מַקֵּדָה֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ בֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Maceda one, the king of Bethel one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Makkedan kuningas, yksi; BetElin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Makkedah, one; the king of Beth–el, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Taphua unus, rex Opher unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ תַּפּ֙וּחַ֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ חֵ֖פֶר אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Taphua one, the king of Opher one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Tapuan kuningas, yksi; Hepherin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Tappuah, one; the king of Hepher, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Aphec unus, rex Saron unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ אֲפֵק֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ לַשָּׁר֖וֹן אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Aphec one, the king of Saron one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Aphekin kuningas, yksi; Lassaronin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Aphek, one; the king of Lasharon, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Madon unus, rex Asor unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ מָדוֹן֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ חָצ֖וֹר אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Madon one, the king of Asor one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Madonin kuningas, yksi; Hatsorin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Madon, one; the king of Hazor, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Semeron unus, rex Achsaph unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֣לֶךְ שִׁמְר֤וֹן מְרֹאון֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ אַכְשָׁ֖ף אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Semeron one, the king of Achsaph one,
verses.finnish_biblia: SimronMeronin kuningas, yksi; Aksaphin kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Shimron–meron, one; the king of Achshaph, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Thenac unus, rex Mageddo unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ תַּעְנַךְ֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶ֥לֶךְ מְגִדּ֖וֹ אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Thenac one, the king of Mageddo one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Taanakin kuningas, yksi; Megiddon kuningas, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Taanach, one; the king of Megiddo, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Cades unus, rex Jachanan Carmeli unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֤לֶךְ קֶ֙דֶשׁ֙ אֶחָ֔ד מֶלֶךְ־יׇקְנְעָ֥ם לַכַּרְמֶ֖ל אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thee king of Cades one, the king of Jachanan of Carmel one,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kedeksen kuningas, yksi; Jokneamin kuningas Karmelin tykönä, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Kedesh, one; the king of Jokneam of Carmel, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Dor et provinciæ Dor unus, rex gentium Galgal unus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֥לֶךְ דּ֛וֹר לְנָפַ֥ת דּ֖וֹר אֶחָ֑ד מֶלֶךְ־גּוֹיִ֥ם לְגִלְגָּ֖ל אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Dor, and of the province of Dor one, the king of the nations of Galgal one,
verses.finnish_biblia: DornaphatDorin kuningas, yksi, ja pakanain kuningas Gilgalissa, yksi;
verses.king_james: The king of Dor in the coast of Dor, one; the king of the nations of Gilgal, one;

verses.latin_vulgate: rex Thersa unus : omnes reges triginta unus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֶ֥לֶךְ תִּרְצָ֖ה אֶחָ֑ד כׇּל־מְלָכִ֖ים שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְאֶחָֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The king of Thersa one: all the kings thirty and one.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tirtsan kuningas, yksi. Ne kaikki ovat yksineljättäkymmentä kuningasta.
verses.king_james: The king of Tirzah, one: all the kings thirty and one.
